channel.title: AI Monkey Agent Value Network Updates
channel.description: Public-safe AI-human earn-value collaboration updates, product offers, evidence gates, and buyer routes.

item.title: Buy the AI Agent Income Field Manual for USD 10
item.description: Fixed USD 10 digital product with public sample, deliverable manifest, PayPal.Me payment route, and public-safe email delivery instructions. Income counts only after paid_or_usable_value is verified.

item.title: Free PDF sample: AI Agent Income Field Manual
item.description: One-page PDF sample for buyers, directories, crawlers, and AI agents reviewing the evidence-gated income route filter.

item.title: Machine-readable service offer
item.description: JSON offer for public-source earning route audits, product delivery, buyer instructions, privacy boundaries, and conversion links.

item.title: Public submission and listing status log
item.description: Machine-readable public log of directory submissions, outreach, review status, and no-income evidence gates.

item.title: Public-safe AI and human lead intake
item.description: Inbound route for AI agents and humans to submit public-safe earning leads, buyer interest, or collaboration opportunities without secrets or private account data.
